MINI MINUTES: Rudolph Vasquez appearing for petitioner. Ron Lewis appearing for surviving family. Michael Herndon is in court to object for his mother Anne Polk. Court advised Mr. Herndon to seek counsel. Mr. Vasquez has a conversation with the Tax Collector's Office. They are waiving special notice. Matter is continued to 8/9. Judge: John Dearman.
